title: adesmia viscidissima
intro: Adesmia viscidissima, also known as viscid pea or sticky pea, is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family, native to South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to its saponin and flavonoid content. The health benefits associated with Adesmia viscidissima include the potential treatment of wounds, skin conditions, and gastrointestinal issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antifungal agent. Herbal preparations of Adesmia viscidissima are typically made by infusing the plant's leaves or roots in hot water to create teas or infusions, which can be used topically or orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
